audits.correction_instruction: Remove disconnected fragments outside the main anatomy.

correction_plan.rationale: Deterministic component count exceeds the ontology maximum.

audits.evidence: Deterministic topology found 220 components; ontology allows 1.
audits.label: right_foot_base

observations.contour: The cyan proposed boundary over the source image matches the anatomy of the right foot base without any fragmentation or misplacement.
observations.full_context: The full context image shows a person in underwear with the right foot base highlighted by a cyan box.
observations.mask: The proposed binary mask covers the correct anatomy of the right foot base without any background or clothing overlap. It includes all visible pixels and excludes other anatomical regions.
observations.neighbor_overlap: There is no overlap with other protected anatomical labels.
observations.overlay: The red overlay shows that the mask correctly identifies the right foot base region in the source crop, with no misclassification.
observations.source_crop: The source crop is a high-resolution image of the right foot base, showing detailed skin texture and contours.
